scripts.test:sequence: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts tests/login-negative.spec.ts tests/forgot-password.spec.ts tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts tests/login-negative.spec.ts tests/forgot-password.spec.ts tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Edge --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts tests/login-negative.spec.ts tests/forgot-password.spec.ts tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Firefox --workers=1 && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts tests/login-negative.spec.ts tests/forgot-password.spec.ts tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=WebKit --workers=1
scripts.test:chrome:only: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts tests/login-negative.spec.ts tests/forgot-password.spec.ts tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:no-deprecation: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:sequence:no-deprecation: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:all:no-deprecation: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/login-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test tests/forgot-password-negative.spec.ts --project=Chrome --workers=1
scripts.test:html: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test --reporter=html
scripts.test:report: npx tsx src/increment-run.ts && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation&& npx playwright test --reporter=html && npx playwright show-report artifacts\playwright-report
